song.title: I Stand In Awe
song.author: Mark Altrogge
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G Gsus G GM7 You are beautiful beyond description, . C2/G G G2 G Too marvelous for words, . GM7 Too wonderful for comprehension, . C D Like nothing ever seen or heard. .D/C Em G/A Who can grasp Your infinite wisdom? . C D D/C Who can fathom the depth of Your love? . G GM7 You are beautiful beyond description, . C Dsus D G C/D Majesty enthroned a_bove.
[C] . G D/G C2/D C And I stand, I stand, in awe of You. . G D/G C2/D C I stand, I stand in awe of You. . B7sus B7 CM7 CM7/A Holy God, to whom all praise is due, . Am7 D G I stand in awe of You.
